extraction.one_line_summary: KRON Andreas attacked the final climb, held off disorganized peloton after neutralization at 9km allowed GC riders to sit up
tactical_patterns: Race neutralization at 9km instead of 3km created split incentives: opportunists attacked while GC contenders soft-pedaled to safety.
ROMO Javier repeatedly targeted KOM points from first categorized climb, revealing early jersey hunting strategy from non-GC threats.
EF mechanic positioned perfectly for KRON's late crash, suggesting team cars anticipated attack chaos in final kilometers despite neutralization.

rider_signals.KRON Andreas: positive: attacked final climb despite earlier crash, showing opportunism when GC riders mentally checked out at neutralization point
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: required nature break with teammates mid-race, vocal displeasure about TTT conditions suggests mental fragility carrying into road stages
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: DSM squad took virtual red jersey despite starting TTT in near-darkness, showing depth beyond stage racing favorites
